reasoning: The control AU-12(4) focuses on audit record generation, specifically auditing query parameters related to personally identifiable information (PII). In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to the audit logging capabilities of the API server. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture requests, including query parameters, which is essential for auditing access to PII. The functions proposed ensure that API server request logging is enabled, query parameters are captured in audit logs, and sensitive data access is logged according to the audit policy.
title: Audit Record Generation - Audit record generation | query parameter audits of personally identifiable info
